arts.ttl: Stadium Where Arsenal, Chelsea & Tottenham Played Has Been Demolished
arts.sum: Once one of the biggest stadiums in world football, the Shah Alam Stadium is being demolished in time for a modern, multi-purpose replacement.

arts.ttl: Arsenal make €40m bid for the 'new Del Piero'
arts.sum: Juventus rejected bids this summer ranging from €30-40 million from Arsenal and Borussia Dortmund for teenage wonderkid Kenan Yildiz . Juventus rejected the offers from Arsenal and Dortmund and made it clear that the 19-year-old Turkey star is not for sale at any price.

arts.ttl: Former Arsenal star ready to pay to play for Barcelona and solve injury crisis
arts.sum: Barcelona's first choice keeper Marc-Andre ter Stegen has since undergone successful knee surgery but now faces several months out - and the Spanish giants reportedly see Wojciech Szczesny as the perfect replacement

arts.ttl: Report: What Arsenal staff have been doing in private since the 2-2 draw with Man City at the Etihad
Paul Scholes voices major Arsenal concern as Man Utd legend makes four-word claim
arts.sum: Manchester United legend Paul Scholes has discussed Arsenal's start to the season and the Gunners' chances of toppling Manchester City in the Premier League title race

arts.ttl: Ticket info: Newcastle United v Arsenal
arts.sum: Those supporters who have been informed to collect their tickets for this match, will be sent an email in advance of the date of the game with all the relevant ticket collection details. Ticket collections will continue to be enforced along with the Away Ticket Transfer service, as part of our ongoing efforts to ensure that genuine Arsenal supporters are using these tickets.

arts.ttl: Report: Arsenal are now planning their move for 'extraordinary' striker with six-man shortlist drawn up
Exclusive: Arsenal 25-26 Away Kit to Bring Back 1995-96 Vibes
arts.sum: Footy Headlines can leak that the Arsenal 25-26 away uniform will bring back the vibes of their iconic 95-96 shirts.

arts.ttl: Eintracht Frankfurt’s Hugo Larsson wanted by top European clubs: Bayern Munich, Borussia Dortmund, Arsenal & more interested
arts.sum: Bayern Munich, Borussia Dortmund, and Arsenal are just a number of top European clubs keeping tabs on Eintracht Frankfurt’s Hugo Larsson, according to Jason Pettigrove. The Swedish international only moved…

arts.ttl: Exclusive: 'World class' player who rejected Arsenal now in talks to join Barcelona on free transfer
